title: How to Add CSS
content:
### Three Ways to Add CSS --- ### 1. External CSS Link a separate `.css` file in ``: ```html ``` **Pros:** Reusable across pages, cached by browser. --- ### 2. Internal CSS Use ` ``` **Pros:** No extra file, good for single pages. --- ### 3. Inline CSS Add `style` attribute directly: ```html

Hello

``` **Cons:** Hard to maintain, not reusable. --- ### Priority (When They Conflict) | Priority | Method | |----------|--------| | 1 (highest) | Inline CSS | | 2 | Internal CSS | | 3 | External CSS | | 4 (lowest) | Browser default | --- > **Best Practice:** Use external CSS for production. Internal for single pages. Inline only for quick tests.
codeExample: Alert

quiz.question: What is the best method for production websites?
